services.title: Services - TomyBot

whatIsToken.title: What is Token
whatIsToken.description: Token is the billing unit for AI services. Each conversation consumes a certain number of tokens. The number of tokens determines how many times and for how long you can use the AI service.

howToCalculate.title: How Consumption is Calculated
howToCalculate.description: Token consumption is related to conversation length. Generally, 1000 Chinese characters equal approximately 1500 tokens. The system displays your token balance and consumption in real-time.

validityRules.title: Validity Rules
validityRules.description: Purchased tokens can be used anytime within the validity period. Unused tokens will expire after the validity period. Permanent packages have no time limit.

refundPolicy.title: Refund Policy
refundPolicy.description: Purchased token packages support a 7-day no-questions-asked refund (if unused). Please contact customer service for any issues.

content.intro: We value your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, store, and protect your personal information.

share.title: Sharing Circumstances
share.description: We do not sell your personal information to third parties. We only share in the following circumstances:

disclosure.title: Information Disclosure
disclosure.description: We do not publicly disclose your personal information unless you explicitly consent or as required by law.

transfer.title: Information Transfer
transfer.description: In the event of a merger, acquisition, or asset sale, we will notify you and continue to protect your privacy.

security.title: Information Security
security.description: We use industry-standard security measures to protect your information, including data encryption and access control.

cookie.title: Cookie Policy
cookie.description: We use cookies to improve your experience. You can manage cookies in your browser settings.

minors.title: Protection of Minors
minors.description: Our service is not intended for children under 13. If we discover we have collected information from a child, we will delete it promptly.

updates.title: Policy Updates
updates.description: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Significant changes will be notified via email or website.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: For privacy-related questions, please contact us through the Contact page.

content.intro: Welcome to TomyBot services. By using this service, you agree to the following terms.
content.acceptance: By using this service, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree with these terms, please do not use this service.

description.title: Service Content
description.intro: TomyBot provides AI chat, knowledge base management, intelligent customer service, and other services.

changes.title: Service Changes
changes.description: We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or terminate any part or all of the service at any time without notice.

description.title: Billing Description
description.intro: Services are billed based on tokens. Specific prices are shown on the purchase page.

prohibited.title: Prohibited Activities
prohibited.description: It is prohibited to use this service for illegal activities, infringing on others' rights, or spreading harmful information.

responsibility.title: User Responsibility
responsibility.description: You are responsible for your actions when using this service and should comply with relevant laws and regulations.

ours.title: Our Rights
ours.description: All content, technology, trademarks, and other intellectual property of this service belong to us.

yours.title: Your Rights
yours.description: Content you upload remains yours, but you grant us a license to use, store, and process it.

aiOutput.title: AI Output Disclaimer
aiOutput.description: AI-generated content is for reference only and does not constitute professional advice. We make no guarantees about its accuracy.

interruption.title: Service Interruption
interruption.description: We are not liable for service interruptions due to force majeure, system maintenance, or other reasons.

user.title: User Termination
user.description: You may cancel your account and stop using the service at any time.

us.title: Our Termination
us.description: If you violate these terms, we reserve the right to suspend or terminate your account.

modifications.title: Terms Modifications
modifications.description: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Significant changes will be notified in advance.

disputes.title: Dispute Resolution
disputes.description: Disputes arising from these terms should be resolved through friendly negotiation. If negotiation fails, legal channels may be pursued.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: For questions, please contact us through the Contact page.
